name: Is hearing loss from factory noise considered occupational disease or injury?

mainEntity.name: Is hearing loss from factory noise considered occupational disease or injury?

acceptedAnswer.description: Occupational disease in Utah/Idaho for gradual exposure, treated under workers' comp.[1][2][3] Same benefits apply.[2] Key factors: Last exposure triggers SOL, prove arising out of employment.[2] File as disease with Labor Commission/Idaho Industrial Comm.[2][3] Expert differentiates from age.[3]
